title: Robert Cotten
compiled_truth: Robert Cotten is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-26 to 2001-07-16), Robert Cotten sent 189 and received 393 emails, totalling 582 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (164), [O'Neal Winfree](people/o-neal-winfree) (67), [Vance Taylor](people/vance-taylor) (57), [Melissa Graves](people/melissa-graves) (44), [Susan Smith](people/susan-smith) (35).
